DP.188.0000:
The Battle Zone used to attract only
the hardiest of the Trainers.\f
They were considered eccentric for
gathering at a place like this.\f
It’s hard to believe how much it’s
changed since then.\f
Places like the Fight Area and the
Survival Area just seemed to spring\r
up overnight.
DP.188.0001:
He was one of those early eccentrics
who were around during the early days\f
of the Battle Zone. Well, I was too.
